page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg9i.36xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 144 dedicated physical cores using the Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor, operating at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz with a single thread per core. The system is equipped with 768.0 GB of RAM, providing a resource density of 5.33 GB of memory per core.

This server configuration does not include local storage or GPU hardware, requiring external network-attached storage for data persistence. It provides a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps to support high-throughput data transfers. The lack of integrated local storage and GPU accelerators represents a tradeoff, positioning this instance specifically for non-graphical, network-dependent compute tasks.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.hfg9i.36xlarge offers high compute density with dedicated physical cores, making it suitable for large-scale parallel processing where hyperthreading overhead must be avoided. Appropriate workloads include high-performance computing, intensive CPU-bound simulations, large-scale compilation, and distributed enterprise applications that rely on high network throughput and dedicated CPU allocation.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg9i.36xlarge is an x86_64 server featuring 144 dedicated physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 6982P-C processors running at 3.4 GHz. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides 768.0 GB of RAM, translating to 5.33 GB of memory per core. It lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, meaning all storage operations rely on network-attached systems, supported by a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps. The dedicated single-thread-per-core architecture eliminates hyperthreading overhead, making it highly efficient for compute-intensive tasks. This configuration is designed for workloads such as high-performance computing, large-scale parallel processing, and network-heavy enterprise applications requiring consistent CPU performance.
